# BP-117 negative: Echo Bind errors are returned to the framework.
lang: go
file: BP-117-safe.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

// echo.Binder is configured by the application for this path.

type Request struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func create(c echo.Context) error {
	var request Request
	if err := c.Bind(&request); err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("bind request: %w", err)
	}
	return nil
}
